case_title: MAHER MEMARZADEH VS. KAREN D. TUBACH

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF MAHER MEMARZADEH IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KAREN D. TUBACH VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SENT CASE FILE BACK TO PLAINTIFF. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MESSENGER FOR PLANTIFF **SEE NOTES FOR 9/20/21**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$70.00) SERVED SEP-02-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TUBACH, KAREN D.
REMARK: EXHIBITS SUMBITTED BY MESSENGER FOR PLANTIFF
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-22, 2021 AT 3:30P.M. CLAIMS AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR LATE HUSBAND'S ATTORNEY SERVICES ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEMARZADEH, MAHER AS TO DEFENDANT TUBACH, KAREN D.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEMARZADEH, MAHER
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT TUBACH, KAREN D.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MEMARZADEH, MAHER AS TO DEFENDANT TUBACH, KAREN D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-22-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MAHER MEMARZADEH IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT KAREN D. TUBACH IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBTS RETAINED. DEFENDANT STATES TO THE COURT THAT THIS IS A CLAIM AGAINST HER LATE HUSBAND FOR ATTONERY SERVICES AND THAT SHE IS NOT THE EXECUTOR TO HIS ESTATE. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT SHE IS IN THE PROCESS OF OPENING PROBATE PROCEEDINGS IN REGARDS TO HER LATE HUSBAND'S ESTATE. COURT DETERMINES THAT CLAIMS AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR LEGAL FEES RELATED TO HER LATE HUSBAND ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO SEND PLAINTIFF HIS CASE FILE AND UPDATE THE COURT AND PLAINTIFF OF USPS TRACKING NUMBER. IF THIS INFORMATION HAS NOT BEEN RECEIVED AT THE TIME OF THE NEXT HEARING, PUNITVE DAMAGES OF $200.00, WILL AWARDED. ALL PARTIES MAY APPEAR BY ZOOM. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED BY THE COURT THAT VIDEO CAPABLITIES ON ZOOM IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING, INSTEAD OF CALLING IN BY TELEPHONE THROUGH ZOOM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
